$comment: Era progression table — Stone → Bronze → Iron → Renaissance. Each row declares the science threshold to enter the era + future unlocks. Adding a 5th era (Industrial, etc) = ONE entry here; eraForScience, nextEra, eraProgressFraction, the HUD badge, the era-unlock dispatch all pick it up automatically. M_POLISH2.X4.27 + MODES.43.

eras.label: Stone
eras.$comment: Starting era — wood + stone economy only.

eras.label: Renaissance
eras.$comment: Final era — build a Wonder while in Renaissance = win.
